title: Advanced Enderite
description: An addon for the Enderite mod that extends the progression even further
body: **Advanced Enderite** This mods is based on the Enderite and extens the progression further that requires a serious amount of dedication to mine resources to have the best gear possible. However having such gear is very rewarding and keeps getting better as you go further since as you increase the tier of the upgrade, you get more armor, damage, efficiency and enchantability. Upgrade Tiers: - Netherite Enderite - Iron Enderite - Gold Enderite - Emerald Enderite - Diamond Enderite - Amethyst Enderite **Use all the trims you want** *You are free to use this mod in any modpack you wish* for bugs please dm me on discord: - qxzap
